name: zsys_measure_cpu_mhz_rdtsc_qpc
description: CpuBenchmarkResolver::MeasureCpuMhz_RdtscQpc measures CPU rate using a monotonic counter and QueryPerformanceCounter timing.
known_limits: The smoke covers this helper through zSys::GetCpuMhz and verifies a nonnegative caller-visible CPU MHz result.
The original uses RDTSC directly; the production source currently uses the portable RecoilReadTimestampCounter surrogate.
